artifacts.name: agent-guidelines
artifacts.description: Agent guidelines — project overview, TDD methodology, environment/tooling, the four-layer clearinghouse layout (framework/domain/adapters/API), per-package module map, infrastructure/systemd topology, DB role split, env vars, and code exploration policy. Source of truth for how the repo is organized.

artifacts.name: architecture-design
artifacts.description: MVP architecture design — the four-layer clearinghouse split (clearinghouse-core / domain-legislative / per-jurisdiction adapters / deployment API), provenance model, and adapter contract. Source of truth for the data model and high-level design decisions.

artifacts.name: architecture-specs
artifacts.description: Architecture specs — jurisdiction decoupling, identity sync, Power Map sync sidecar, WSL SOAP transformation, committee historical backfill, merge-orphan self-heal, subscription sync, and more. Source of truth for design decisions per subsystem.

artifacts.name: design-plans
artifacts.description: Per-phase implementation plans — foundation/discovery, hybrid legislative IA, jurisdiction decoupling, sync sidecar, outbox dead-letter, entity-event wiring, WSL adapter phases, and later backlog. Historical record of how each phase was built.

artifacts.name: integration-contracts
artifacts.description: Discovery outputs and integration contracts — Archiver/Watcher/Power Map contracts, multi-state legislative IA delta, jurisdictional information architecture, and Power Map reseed guidance.

artifacts.name: commands
artifacts.description: Operational and backfill CLIs — full options, exit codes, and design rationale for the daily/weekly timers and run-once/ad-hoc backfill commands (refreshes, reconcilers, harvests, span builders, integrity sweep).

artifacts.name: skills
artifacts.description: Agent skills directory — available skills, their locations (skills/ and .claude/skills/), and the agentskills.io discovery spec.
